HTML Entities & Encoded Characters

This page tests various HTML entity encodings:

  • Named entities: & < > " ' © ® ™ — – … « »
  • Decimal entities: © ® — – …
  • Hex entities: © ® — – …
  • Accented: café, naïve, résumé, über
  • Symbols: ★ ☆ ❤ ☃ ☂

The extractor should decode all of these into their proper Unicode characters in the output text.

Here's a sentence with “smart quotes” and an em—dash and an en–dash.
